name: Tee Timez
about: Tee Timez is a golf simulator venue that offers a modern and tech-driven experience for golfers of all levels. The venue is equipped with a variety of advanced technology to provide realistic golf simulation, though specific simulator brands and software are not detailed on the website. Pricing is structured on a per-bay or per-person hour basis, making it accessible for both individual practice and group sessions. The atmosphere is casual and welcoming, with a focus on providing a fun and relaxed environment for golf enthusiasts to enjoy the game indoors.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced golf simulation technology for realistic gameplay
Flexible pricing options for individuals and groups
Casual and welcoming atmosphere suitable for various occasions
Multiple payment methods including Apple Pay and Google Pay
Option for private room rentals for exclusive events

food_and_drink.notes: Food service available with kitchen facilities
Full bar service available with cash and card payments

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own golf clubs for the best simulation experience. Club rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, as the venue offers its own full bar and kitchen services for your convenience.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation typically takes around 2-3 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Tee Timez kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Timez is kid-friendly and welcomes families. The casual atmosphere and variety of amenities make it suitable for all ages.
